hero.tagline: Real conversations from the American front porch
hero.description: Join Rick White for honest discussions about faith, family, freedom, and the things that matter most to everyday Americans.

about.title: About the Show
about.text: Front Porch America brings you unfiltered conversations from the heart of America. Rick White sits down with guests to discuss the issues, stories, and values that define us as a nation—one front porch at a time.

community.title: Join the Front Porch
community.text: Get weekly updates, behind-the-scenes content, and exclusive invitations to live events. Be part of the Front Porch America community.
